name: claude-raycast-notifier
title: Claude Hook Sounds
description: Manage Claude Code hook sounds and actionable notifications in Raycast.
author: lee_fulln

commands.name: menu-bar-status
commands.title: Claude Status
commands.description: Show Claude status, sound setup health, and recent events in the Raycast menu bar

commands.name: manage-sounds
commands.title: Manage Claude Sounds
commands.description: Assign sounds to Claude hook event slots

commands.name: sound-library
commands.title: Claude Sound Library
commands.description: Preview bundled and imported Claude hook sounds

commands.name: notify-event
commands.title: Notify Claude Event
commands.description: Render an actionable Claude event and return you to Claude Code

preferences.name: stateFilePath
preferences.title: State File Path
preferences.description: Path to the shared Claude notifier state file

preferences.name: notifierRootPath
preferences.title: Notifier Root Path
preferences.description: Directory containing sound-library.json, sound-mappings.json, and managed sound assets
